do: Use clean white backgrounds with the signature #ebeae5 beige as accent areas to maintain the light, minimal aesthetic
Employ sharp-edged geometric layouts with plenty of white space and clean lines to reflect the modern, clinical approach
Feature bold black text with Roboto font in a science-forward tone that emphasizes personalization, backed by medical expertise
Include sharp-cornered CTA buttons in black with clear action-oriented text like 'Start Your Health Journey' or 'Get Personalized Care'
dont: Use rounded corners, gradients, or soft shadows that contradict the sharp, clinical brand aesthetic
Incorporate bright colors, complex patterns, or busy backgrounds that detract from the minimal, medical-grade appearance
Write in casual, overly friendly language - avoid abandoning the professional, science-based tone for trendy social media speak
Create cluttered layouts with multiple competing elements - maintain the clean, focused approach that emphasizes one clear health benefit per creative
